description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type The indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: IP address IP.ASN The autonomous system name for the IP address
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: The autonomous system name for the IP address IP.Malicious.Vendor The vendor reporting the IP address as malicious
outputs.name: IP.ASOwner

outputs.description: A description explaining why the IP address was reported as malicious Qintel.IP.Address IP address
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description
